description: Incremental v1 (legacy training_metrics.json) to v2 (training_metrics.v2.json) pointer map. v1 paths use dot notation for nested keys.

null_semantics.json_null: Explicit null — quantity not defined, not evaluated, or intentionally omitted for JSON safety (e.g. non-finite float).
null_semantics.empty_object: Use {} only when the section exists but has no scalar payload (e.g. families with no bakeoff run).

mappings.note: Top-level run contract mirror on v2 until reader migration completes.
Bundle-level contract; mirrored on v2 top level.
DEC-026 operating-point validation precision (raw); v2 also nests canonical field_test block.
Canonical field-test precision on validation when selection uses prod-adjusted path; see precision_type.
Maps precision_prod_adjusted to prod_adjusted; precision_raw to raw.
Held-out test precision at training threshold; v2 also nests canonical field_test block.
When present, canonical field-test test reporting prefers prod_adjusted pair; see writer logic.
Moved out of training_metrics v2 main file.
A3 bakeoff report container; winner_backend maps to winner_id in comparison family.
